side_effects.description: Glutes: no sting and no site issues
Thighs: slight sting for a second and feels a bit bruised for a couple hours but nothing visible
Stomach: intense sting that lasts minutes to hours and a dark ugly bruise

protocol_notes: Observed injection site responses vary by anatomical location. Glutes are tolerable with no sting. Thighs produce mild sting and bruising that resolves quickly. Stomach produces intense sting and dark bruising.
